items.headline: Game Recap: Cavaliers 116, Pistons 109
items.description: The Cavaliers improved to 5-0 on their home floor as they defeated the Pistons, 116-109, to take Game 3 but still trail the series, 2-1.

items.headline: Cade Cunningham & James Harden duel in Game 3 at Rocket Mortgage Fieldhouse
items.description: Cade Cunningham & James Harden trade baskets throughout Game 3 on May 9, 2026.

items.headline: Fantastic Finish: Mitchell pours in 35 to get the win in Game 3 as series goes to 2-1
items.description: Donovan Mitchell recorded his 35th career 30-point postseason game, his 16th with the Cavaliers on May 9, 2026.

items.headline: Evan Mobley defies gravity on this double-clutch poster jam
items.description: Evan Mobley throws down a huge jam in Game 3 of the East Semis.

items.headline: Cade Cunningham stays hot scoring 27 in a losing effort on the road in Game 3
items.description: Highlights From Cade Cunningham 27-point game on May 9,  2026.

items.headline: Donovan Mitchell drops 35 in Game 3 win against Pistons
items.description: Highlights From Donovan Mitchell 35-point game on May 9, 2026.
